dict.string: Ascend needs your location to track your route, distance, and speed during missions.
Ascend needs background location access to keep recording your route even when your phone is locked in your pocket.
Ascend uses your iPhone's barometer and motion sensors to accurately calculate your exact elevation gain.
Ascend needs camera access to capture photo highlights during your mission.
Ascent uses your health data (height, weight, VO₂max and activity) to personalize your mountaineering training plan.
Ascent may log mountaineering workouts to Apple Health so they appear in your fitness history.
